features: 6 Pcs Basic Big Kabuki Makeup Brushes and 9 Pcs precise makeup brushes. Cover all your needs of all Your Makeup.
Soft and silky to touch, the foundation brushes are dense and shaped well.Worth the price. Selected gift for mom, wife or female friends.
Easy to carry and use. Package included 15pcs black make up brushes.
High-end wood handle professional makeup brushes set. Non-skin irritation, non-shed. Each handle is labeled, perfect for beginners.
The eye makeup brushes come in a variety of shapes and sizes hence suitable for blending, contouring & highlighting for every face shape.
description: Product Description WHY CHOOSE Z'OREYA MAKEUP BRUSHES SETS Zoreya 15 pieces makeup brushes set contains 5 basic, bigger makeup brushes and 10 relatively smaller brushes. This set meets nearly all your demands for your fantasy looks. Featuring high-cost performance and high quality. This set makes it a bonus for every makeup enthusiast. It covers All Areas On Your Face. It Works well for eyes, nose, lips, cheeks, forehead, and even hard-to-reach areas on your face. It is useful for Versatile applications like Fan, Powder, Blush, Contour, Eye Shadow, Concealing, Blending, Nose Shading, Lip Lining, Eyebrow, Eyeliner, Lash and more. It has Soft Synthetic Fibers & Durable handles. The soft synthetic fibers won't soak up liquids and creams but spread it evenly on your face for a perfectly blended look. The wooden handle is firm and easy to hold. NOTE: The new product will have some smell, please don't worry, it's not from the bristles, but the glue at the connection of the brush rod. Please take out the brushes and put them in the air, the smell will disappear soon. Thanks for your support. Designed for home & professional use! The brush set comes in different shapes and sizes to cover you need to do makeup on different areas of the face and it fits for every face shape. The eye brushes made of premium synthetic fiber materials with wooden handles provide an incredible touch and feel. This master set of eye brushes are ideal for liquids, powders, or creams to produce a beautiful eye and face makeup application. Covering all size and shape of brushes to create a variety of face makeup, the unique brush set can meet all your needs, show your natural beauty and leave a flawless makeup. The handles of makeup brushes are made of high-end alloy and wood material. Easy to grab and durable for long time using. The bristles of the makeup brush kit are well made of durable synthetic fiber - soft and silky nylon. No cruelty and skin-friendly. Labeled makeup brushes, good for beginner How to clean your Makeup Brush Run the synthetic bristles of the brush under warm running water.(Do Not Use Hot Water as It may damage the cosmetic Brushes) Apply a small amount of gentle facial cleanser or brush cleaner to the synthetic bristles and work into a light lather. Rinse the bristles thoroughly under running water. You will notice that the water leaving the brush is tinted from old makeup. Continue rinsing until no color remains on the brush. Allow the brush to air-dry. Perfect for a gift! Intended for makeup beginners and enthusiasts. Makeup brush kit is a selected gift for mom, wife, female friends on any occasion-Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, Mother's Day, wedding anniversary, and so on. Perfect for Liquid Foundation It is a stippling brush to apply powder, cream, and liquid products onto the skin without trapping or absorption of the product High-end Wooden Handle It is the perfect size for blush and bronzer. The makeup brushes made of premium synthetic fiber materials provide an incredible touch and feel. Soft & Dense Synthetic Hair A selection of fine brush heads with soft and thick bristles. Cruelty-free hair. so soft, dense, silky, and applies foundation so well.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: For Blush, For Eyeshadow, For Foundation
